lesson.title: CAPS.Mathematics.Gr9.MEAS.1: Area and perimeter of polygons. Surface area and volume o...
lesson.explanation: Perimeter is the distance around a shape. Area is the space inside a 2D shape: rectangle = l × w, triangle = ½ × b × h, circle = πr². Volume is the space inside a 3D shape: rectangular prism = l × w × h, cylinder = πr²h. Surface area is the total area of all faces. Always include the correct units: cm for length, cm² for area, cm³ for volume.

flashcards.front: What is the key concept in Area, Perimeter, and Volume?
flashcards.back: Perimeter is the distance around a shape. Area is the space inside a 2D shape: rectangle = l × w, triangle = ½ × b × h, circle = πr². Volume is the space inside a 3D shape: rectangular prism = l × w × h, cylinder = πr²h. Surface area is the total area of all faces. Always include the correct units: cm for length, cm² for area, cm³ for volume.
